name: OpenRouter Infer (budget-gated)

parameters.jsonBody: ={ "model": "{{ $('Compute Skills Router HMAC').item.json._meta.model }}", "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "{{ $('Compute Skills Router HMAC').item.json._meta.prompt }}" }] }

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: =⚠ OpenRouter $10/day budget threshold reached. Approve to proceed: prompt="{{ $('Compute Skills Router HMAC').item.json._meta.prompt }}" remaining=${{ $json.remaining }}

_comment: Import via n8n UI: Workflows → Import from file. Set env vars OPENROUTER_INFER_WEBHOOK_SECRET, SKILLS_ROUTER_URL, SKILLS_ROUTER_SECRET, OPENROUTER_RUNTIME_KEY, TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN before activating. The runtime key is provisioned with a $10/day cap (limit_reset=daily) by tools/provision-openrouter-runtime-key.sh; OpenRouter rejects calls server-side once the cap is hit.
